# duplocloud_rds_instance (Data Source)

`duplocloud_rds_instance` retrieves the current configuration of an RDS instance (or promoted read replica) for a given tenant. Because this datasource always fetches live data from the API, it reflects the current writer endpoint after a failover event.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "duplocloud_rds_instance" "reader" {
  tenant_id = var.tenant_id
  name      = "duploread-replica"
}

output "rds_reader_host" {
  value = data.duplocloud_rds_instance.reader.host
}


data "duplocloud_rds_instance" "cluster" {
  tenant_id = var.tenant_id
  name      = "duplocluster"
}

output "rds_cluster_host" {
  value = data.duplocloud_rds_instance.cluster.host
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the RDS instance.
- `tenant_id` (String) The GUID of the tenant.

### Read-Only

- `allocated_storage` (Number) The allocated storage in gigabytes.
- `arn` (String) The ARN of the RDS instance.
- `auto_minor_version_upgrade` (Boolean) Whether auto minor version upgrade is enabled.
- `availability_zone` (String) The Availability Zone of the RDS instance.
- `backup_retention_period` (Number) The backup retention period in days.
- `cluster_identifier` (String) The RDS Cluster Identifier.
- `cluster_parameter_group_name` (String) Parameter group associated with this instance's DB Cluster.
- `db_name` (String) The name of the database.
- `db_subnet_group_name` (String) Name of DB subnet group.
- `deletion_protection` (Boolean) Whether deletion protection is enabled.
- `enable_iam_auth` (Boolean) Whether RDS IAM authentication is enabled.
- `enable_logging` (Boolean) Whether or not RDS instance logging is enabled.
- `encrypt_storage` (Boolean) Whether or not the RDS instance storage is encrypted.
- `endpoint` (String) The current connection endpoint (host:port) of the RDS instance. Reflects the promoted writer after a failover.
- `engine` (Number) The numerical index of database engine to use for the RDS instance.
- `engine_version` (String) The database engine version.
- `enhanced_monitoring` (Number) The enhanced monitoring interval in seconds.
- `host` (String) The DNS hostname of the RDS instance.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `identifier` (String) The full name of the RDS instance.
- `instance_status` (String) The current status of the RDS instance.
- `iops` (Number) The IOPS value for the RDS instance.
- `kms_key_id` (String) The globally unique identifier for the KMS key.
- `master_username` (String) The master username of the RDS instance.
- `multi_az` (Boolean) Whether the RDS instance is multi-AZ.
- `parameter_group_name` (String) The RDS parameter group name applied to the instance.
- `performance_insights` (List of Object) Amazon RDS Performance Insights configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--performance_insights))
- `port` (Number) The listening port of the RDS instance.
- `size` (String) The instance type of the RDS instance.
- `skip_final_snapshot` (Boolean) Whether the final snapshot is skipped on delete.
- `snapshot_id` (String) The database snapshot the RDS instance was initialized from.
- `storage_autoscaling` (List of Object) Storage autoscaling configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--storage_autoscaling))
- `storage_type` (String) Storage type used for RDS instance storage.
- `store_details_in_secret_manager` (Boolean) Whether or not RDS details are stored in the AWS secrets manager.
- `v2_scaling_configuration` (List of Object) Serverless v2 scaling configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--v2_scaling_configuration))

<a id="nestedatt--performance_insights"></a>
### Nested Schema for `performance_insights`

Read-Only:

- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `kms_key_id` (String)
- `retention_period` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--storage_autoscaling"></a>
### Nested Schema for `storage_autoscaling`

Read-Only:

- `enable` (Boolean)
- `max_allocated_storage` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--v2_scaling_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `v2_scaling_configuration`

Read-Only:

- `max_capacity` (Number)
- `min_capacity` (Number)
